_meta.urlPattern: data only - join by id to skill/manifest.json. stats[] holds Final Damage/Mastery formulas with an alwaysOn verdict (sum only alwaysOn==true && !flaggedForReview for a baseline); rawFormulas carries every other key on the skill for context.
